'''âf-y-h-n''' ('''kafayhenoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:jambok|jambok]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-y-h-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:jambok|jambok]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âf-y-h-n
|-
! Lemma
| kafayhenoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thifayhenoko|thifayhenoko]] || [[word:jifayhenoko|jifayhenoko]] || [[word:shifayhenoko|shifayhenoko]] || [[word:kifayhenoko|kifayhenoko]]
|-
